blocks.label: BME280 Setup

libraries.bme280.py:
# BME280 MicroPython Driver
# Standard driver code for BME280 sensor
from machine import I2C
import time

class BME280:
    def __init__(self, i2c, address=0x76):
        self.i2c = i2c
        self.address = address
        # (Driver logic here...)
        self.temperature = 25.0
        self.humidity = 50.0
        self.pressure = 1013.25
